boundary_binding.action_boundary: Purchase approval must match budget and approver threshold
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: budget line plus approver threshold not closed

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record explicitly states the budget line plus approver threshold dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. Policy requires exact source-bound closure before execution, and the communication boundary forbids deciding from helpful tone or urgency alone.
